resources.string: Send a Friend Request by ID or Name
Are you sure you want to remove \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d) as a friend?
Are you sure you want to cancel the friend request to \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d)?
Can\'t send friend request to yourself
Pick a square and watch a short video ad to earn voidstones!
You\'ve watched too many ads recently. Please try again in %s.
Not logged in. Please log in first.
Log out all devices of %s? This may take up to an hour.
Log out all devices? This may take up to an hour.
Are you sure you want to delete your Merg account and all data associated with it? THIS CANNOT BE UNDONE!
Name color gradient is already unlocked
Search for an account by ID or Name
This clan is private or no longer active.
Are you sure you want to leave this clan?
You must transfer ownership to another member before leaving.
Are you sure you want to disband this clan? This cannot be undone!
You are already in a clan.
You are already in a clan. Leave your current clan and accept this invite?
Kick \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d) from the clan? They may rejoin by request.
Ban \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d) from the clan? They will never be able to rejoin.
Unban \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d)? They will be able to rejoin.
This player is banned from your clan.
Player is already invited or in the clan.
This clan\'s invite list is full (max 100).
This player already has the maximum number of pending invites.
This clan\'s join request list is full (max 100).
You are not a member of this clan.
You already have a pending join request to another clan.
Are you sure you want to unkick \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d)?
Are you sure you want to unban \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d)?
You are about to promote \"%1$s\" (ID: %2$d) to Owner. You will be demoted to Co-Owner. This cannot be undone.\n\nType the player\'s ID to confirm:
Failed to save clan name colors
Eat smaller players and become the largest blob in the universe! Use your size to dominate the map, but watch out for bigger players who want to eat you!
Join forces with other players of the same color! Work together to trap enemies and become the dominant team on the leaderboard. Teammates cannot eat each other.
One life, one round! Collect as much as possible before the grace period ends. After that, death is permanent! Be the last one standing or the biggest when time runs out to win!
Survival mode with teams! Work with your teammates to eliminate other teams. Last team standing or biggest combined size when time is up wins!
Compete in elimination rounds! Players can respawn freely until eliminated at regular intervals. The smallest players at each interval are eliminated permanently. Be the last one standing to win!
Complete challenging stages with unique objectives! Progress through increasing difficulties, earn rewards, and see how far you can go. Each stage brings new challenges!
Capture the ball and shoot it into the enemy goal to score. The team with the most goals when time runs out wins!
This mode is coming soon, stay tuned!
Portrait and Landscape customizations are saved separately
Respawn? You will lose all your Size.
Change language to %s? The app will be reloaded.
You are already in a room!
Are you sure you want to block %s? You will both be unable to send each other mails or friend requests, and will be removed from each other\'s friends list.

To allow other clients to join remotely through public IP, you must port forward UDP %d or enable DMZ for your device on your router\'s settings. Please note that connections may still fail if your network is under Symmetric NAT/CGNAT. For more information and to check your current NAT type, visit %s.
Kick %s from this room? They may rejoin.
Are you sure you want to ban %s from this room? They will never be able to rejoin and this cannot be undone!

Explicitly Forbidden Content:

- NSFW / Sexual content
- Graphic violence / Gore
- Weapons
- Hate symbols
- Hate speech / Discrimination
- Drugs
- Shock/gross-out content
- Copyrighted characters/logos
- Alcohol/tobacco references
- Horror/creepy imagery
Your image %1$dx%2$d is too large (max %3$dx%4$d pixels)
Your image %1$dKB / %3$dx%4$d is too large (max %2$dKB / %5$dx%6$d pixels)
Image could not be compressed to fit the size limit
Request malformed or missing required fields
Invalid or expired session. Please log in again.
Please wait %d second(s) and try again.
Server is rebooting. Please try again shortly.
Server is undergoing maintenance. Please try again later.
Cannot perform this action on yourself
Cannot perform this action on staff members
You must transfer ownership to another member before leaving.
You cannot send mail to yourself
Already requested to join this clan
